layout.layout_rhythm: editorial-tri-tone: medium density, medium-high formality. Three-color editorial system: dusty pink, mustard cream, and deep burgundy, set in Bricolage + Instrument Serif.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"slide_pad": "96px", "chrome_gutter": "64px", "section_gap": "48px", "card_pad": "28px 28px 30px", "chart_pad": "48px 48px 56px", "footer_bottom": "36px", "grid_gap": "24px", "endorsement_pad": "20px 0"}

template_json_typography.style: expressive variable grotesk + literary serif + technical mono; magazine-page typographic system

design_tokens_typography.style: expressive variable grotesk + literary serif + technical mono; magazine-page typographic system

typography.typography_role: expressive variable grotesk + literary serif + technical mono; magazine-page typographic system

cjk_policy.known_degradation: ZCOOL XiaoWei is the right aesthetic match for the em-switch role, but it ships as **weight 400 only with no italic cut**. Chinese has no italic concept (slanted Han glyphs read as broken, not emphasized), so the lack of italic is fine — but the visual softness contrast that Instrument Serif italic provides in Latin (a slanted, more flowing letterform) canno

template_json_palette.description: dusty pink, mustard cream, and deep burgundy used as full-bleed color blocks; very high contrast tri-tone with no fourth color

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: accent_rule.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: window_chrome.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: bold_border.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Bricolage Grotesque 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Instrument Serif 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Serif Pro 与 思源宋体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

letter_spacing_scale.raw_value: -0.02em` to `-0.06em` depending on size. - Don't add solid-color dividers on dark (burgundy) surfaces. All structural lines on dark backgrounds must use low-opacity rgba. - Don't apply box shadows. The system has none. Depth comes from surface contrast and border-radius on contrasting backgrounds. - Don't round large content containers (section panels, grid backgrounds). Rounding applies only to pill-scale and card-scale elements (value cards, chart card). - Don't use Bricolage Grotesque weight

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

italic.raw_value: al-size axis) at extreme weights and negative letter-spacing. Instrument Serif (italic-cut only) appears as the expressive accent face for chapter numerals, pull-quotes, years, and signatures.
